passive_description: Allies are immune to your AoE attacks.
description: Enables large-scale area attacks without risking allies — the go-to for mages who want to clear crowds safely.

passive_description: Your first attack each round gains Bypass.
description: Every round opens with a guaranteed shield-piercing attack — best for precise, single-target magical builds.

passive_description: Whenever you apply Curse to an enemy, they also take 1 damage.
description: Stacks Curse for steady damage-on-application — ideal for builds that want to layer multiple ongoing effects.

passive_description: The first time each round an enemy enters an adjacent space, you may move 1.
description: Attacks from maximum range and repositions when enemies close in — for builds that need to stay mobile and distant.

passive_description: When you deal 3 or more damage in a single attack, apply Stun.
description: Any hit of 3 or more damage strips an enemy buff or ongoing effect — a strong disruptor for hard-hitting builds.

passive_description: If you deal 4 damage to an enemy in a single hit, inflict Weaken 1.
description: Landing big hits applies Weaken — rewards high-damage builds that want to build offensive pressure.

passive_description: The first time each round you attack an enemy, gain Bolster 1.
description: Builds Bolster on every successful attack — for characters who want to be aggressive and protected simultaneously.

passive_description: When you attack, deal one extra damage if you've moved this turn.
description: Moving before attacking unlocks a damage bonus — ideal for mobile frontliners who reposition each round.
Every melee attack ignores 1 armor — the best choice for cutting through heavily armored enemies.

passive_description: Your attacks that deal Bleed, Weaken, or Poison deal one additional stack.
description: Condition-focused builds deal one extra stack of Bleed, Weaken, or Poison — amplifies every debuff you apply.

passive_description: When an enemy's melee attack deals no damage, immediately attack 1 against them.
description: Punishes any melee attack that deals no damage with an automatic counter-attack — rewarding against aggressive but ineffective foes.

passive_description: If a single-target attack does 3+ damage, it also hits the enemy directly behind the target.
description: Strong single-target hits pass through to the enemy directly behind — for builds that like to line enemies up.

passive_description: When you Retaliate, you may move one space.
description: Fight at reach (2-3 spaces) and reposition when you Retaliate — keeps you at your ideal range constantly.

passive_description: Your second and subsequent attacks each turn deal 1 additional damage.
description: Combo fighters that deal more damage with each additional attack in a turn — reward going wide over going deep.

passive_description: The first time each round you apply an elemental condition (Burn, Freeze, or Shock) with an attack, restore 1 card from your discard.
description: The first elemental hit each round restores a card from your discard — a self-sustaining magical melee build for long fights.

passive_description: At the start of each round of combat, gain Bless.
description: A symbol of faith that channels healing, protection, and holy retribution — the anchor a party leans on through the longest fights.
